name: White Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix 1 1/2 cups soy or rice milk with the soy sauce and seasonings.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining milk with the cornstarch until smooth.
3. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the pot of the first mixture, stirring constantly.
4. Cook on low heat for a few minutes, ensuring it thickens quickly.
5. The gravy should hold well even if the rest of dinner isn't ready yet.
